title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.170 - Printing authority to be stated
text:
490.170.  Printing authority to be stated. — There shall be inserted on the title page of all books and documents printed by state officials, a statement showing by what authority the same are printed.
(RSMo 1939 § 1820, A. 1949 S.B. 1148) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1656; 1919 § 5343; 1909 § 6288
